Name: sapdme_inventory
Title: Inventory
ShortText: Perform inventory relevant activities, such as posting or canceling goods receipts, getting stock information, and updating stock data
ChangeLog: [{"date":"15 Feb 2026","notes":"1) Deprecated an endpoint for getting posted goods receipts: /inventory/goodsReceipts. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventory/goodsReceipts<\/a>. 2) Deprecated an endpoint for posting EWM goods receipts: /inventory/ewmGoodsReceipts. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventory/ewmGoodsReceipts.<\/a>. 3) Deprecated an endpoint for retrieving posted goods issues: /inventory/goodsIssues. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventory/goodsIssues.<\/a>.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"16 Nov 2025","notes":"1) Deprecated an endpoint to update stocks: /inventories/{inventoryId}. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventories/{inventoryId}<\/a>. 2) Deprecated an endpoint to transfer stock: /inventories/transfer. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventories/transfer<\/a>. 3) Deprecated two endpoints to get stocks: /inventories, /inventories/advancedQuery. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventories/query<\/a>. 4) Deprecated two endpoints to create stocks: /inventories, /inventories/bulkCreate. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventories/bulkCreate<\/a>. 5) Deprecated an endpoint to sync stocks: /inventories/ewmSynchronization. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventories/ewmSynchronization<\/a>. 6) Deprecated an endpoint to return stock: /inventories/{inventoryId}/return. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventories/{inventoryId}/return<\/a>. 7) Deprecated an endpoint to scrap stock: /inventories/{inventoryId}/scrap. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory_v2/resource>/inventories/{inventoryId}/scrap<\/a>","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"17 August 2025","notes":"1) Added 'storageLocation' to the response of EWM goods receipt API. 2) Add a new API to clear stock. 3) Added a 'quantityOnHandFilter' to the request payload of the stock advanced query API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"19 May 2025","notes":"1) Added the available quantity of the stock in the material's parallel unit of measure in corresponding update stock API. 2) Added properties related to warehouse, comments, thirdPartyImported in the response payload of get stock API. 3) Added request parameter 'bomComponentSequence' to the request body of ERP goods receipt API. 4) Added the 'bomComponentSequence' to the request body of EWM goods receipt API. 5)Added UOM limitation description in the API response description. 6) Added request parameter 'storageLocation' to the request body of EWM goods receipt API. 7) Added the 'bomComponentSequence' to the response payload of GR summarize API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"16 Feb 2025","notes":"1) Added an API to return ERP stock. 2) Added an API to scrap ERP stock.  3) Added properties related to parallel quantity in the request and response payload of post goods receipt API. 4) Added property related to parallel quantity in the response payload of get goods receipt summary and get posted goods receipts APIs. 5) Added the available quantity of the stock in the material's parallel unit of measure in the get stock API. 6)Fixed a documentation issue by labeling the material property as required in the request payload of the get batches API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"23 Nov 2024","notes":"1) Added the 'salesOrder' and 'salesOrderItem' properties in the response of the GET posted goods receipts API; 2) Added the 'salesOrder' and 'salesOrderItem' properties in the request and response payload of GET stock API and advanced query stock API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"24 August 2024","notes":"Added the 'plant' property in the response of the get storage locations API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"25 May 2024","notes":"1) Enhanced the 'status' property to support restricted stock status and added a 'batchesWithStatus' property in the request payload of the following APIs: get stock API, update single stock API, create single stock API, create bulk stocks API and transfer stock API. 2) Added an API to synchronize EWM stocks. 3) Added an API to retrieve the status of asynchronous transactions. 4) Added an API to create production supply areas. 5) Added an API to retrieve production supply areas.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"24 Feb 2024","notes":"1) Added a 'thirdPartyImported' property in the request and response payload of create stock API and create multiple stocks API; 2) Added a 'thirdPartyImported' property in the response payload of update stock API and transfer stock API; 3) Added the description for response code 409. 2) Added a 'thirdPartyImported' property in the response payload of update stock API and transfer stock API. 3) Added an API endpoint to get goods issue postings. 4) Added 'dataFields' in the request payload of create IM goods receipts API. 5) Deleted the endpoint GET /dmcStock that has been decommissioned.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"2 Dec 2023","notes":"1) Added a 'postingDateTime' property in the request payload of POST ERP goods receipts API. 2) Added a 'postingDateTime' property in GET goods receipt postings response payload. 3) Decommissioned the endpoint to get DMC stock: /dmcStock with 2311 release. It will be removed from the Business Accelerator Hub on December 31, 2023. Suggest to use the successor API endpoint <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory/resource>/inventories<\/a>.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Aug 2023","notes":"1) Added a 'postedBy' property in the request and response payload of POST EWM goods receipts API and POST IM goods receipts API. 2) Added a 'createdDateTime' property in GET goods receipt postings response payload. 2) Added a new API endpoint to retrieve stocks.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 May 2023","notes":"1) Added 'inventorIds' as query parameter","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"18 Feb 2023","notes":"1) Added a new API endpoint to create multiple inventories all at once. 2) Enhanced error handling for POST EWM goods receipts and POST ERP goods receipts APIs: 500 error code is replaced by 409 error code for failure in concurrent operations by multiple users. 3) Enhanced UPDATE inventory API by supporting updating 'assemblyData' field values. 4) Added a new 'stockRetrieveScope' property in GET inventory API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"12 Nov 2022","notes":"Inventory API changelog: Added APIs to create, update and transfer stocks. Enhanced stock retrieval API with assembly data information.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Aug 2022","notes":"Added new endpoints to post goods receipts, summarize goods receipts, get goods receipts, cancels goods receipts, get storage locations, and get stocks; Deprecated an endpoint to get DMC stock: /dmcStock. Use new <a href=https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_inventory/resource>/inventories<\/a>.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"26 Mar 2022","notes":"Added 'status' as query parameter","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"13 Nov 2021","notes":"Added inventoryId as query parameter","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"22 May 2021","notes":"First version","state":"Active","version":"v1"}]
